english translation text:
Dua “Allahumma Yaa Ajwada Man A’ataa - - -”
(Mafatul Jinan pg. 259)
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah! O the Most Generous who gives more than all the givers!

arabic text: وَيا خَيْرَ مَنْ سُئِلَ، وَيا اَرْحَمَ مَنِ اسْتُرْحِمَ
english translation text: O the Best (eternally) Besought of all those who are beseeched! O the Most Merciful of all the merciful!

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ فِى الاَْوَّلينَ
english translation text: O Allah send blessing on Muhammad and on his children in the earlier times,

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ فِى الاْخِرينَ
english translation text: and send blessings on Muhammad and on his children in the later times,

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ فِى الْمَلاَءِ الاَْعْلى
english translation text: And send blessings on Muhammad and on his children, (in the midst of those) living in a satisfying state of the highest degree,

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ فِى الْمُرْسَلينَ
english translation text: And send blessings on Muhammad and on his children in the midst of the Messengers.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَهِ الْوَسيلَةَ وَالْفَضيلَةَ وَالشَّرَفَ وَالرَّفْعَةَ وَالدَّرَجَةَ الْكَبيرَةَ
english translation text: O Allah give to Muhammad and his children (all) rights of being “the means of approach” (unto Thee), and abundant merits, distinctions, high ranks, and most important privileges.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اِنّى آمَنْتُ بِمُحَمَّد صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah I have accepted the “truth of Muhammad” (Allah’s blessings be on him and on his children),

arabic text: وَلَمْ اَرَهُ فَلا تَحْرِمْنى فِى الْقِيامَةِ رُؤْيَتَهُ
english translation text: though I have not met him, therefore let it not be that I am deprived of his vision on the Day of Judgment,
and let my life (in the Hereafter be spent in his company, make me follow his creed,

arabic text: وَاسْقِنى مِنْ حَوْضِهِ مَشْرَباً رَوِيّاً سآئِغاً هَنيئاً لا اَظْمَأُ بَعْدَهُ اَبَداً
english translation text: And let me quench my thirst from his cistern (Kawthar), thoroughly, in plenty, gliding the wholesome water pleasantly down the throat, never ever to be thirsty again,
Verily, Thou art able to do all things.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اِنّى آمَنْتُ بِمُحَمَّد صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah I have accepted the “truth of Muhammad” (Allah’s blessings on him and on his children),

arabic text: وَلَمْ اَرَهُ فَعَرَِّفْنى فِى الْجِنانِ وَجْهَهُ
english translation text: though I have not met him, therefore, let me remain aware of his true aspects in the Paradise.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ بَلِّغْ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مِنّى تَحِيَّةً كَثيرَةً وَسَلاماً
english translation text: O Allah convey to Muhammad (Allah’s blessings be on him and on his children) my much compliments and salutations.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
